hero.title: Your trusted partner in digital tech
hero.sub: We create customized IT solutions for your business: industry, transportation, service, and other sectors.

second.title: Modern technologies and practical solutions for digitalizing your business
second.sub: End-to-end digital transformation — from concept to deployment and beyond.
second.s1_body: We develop custom web platforms, mobile apps, and corporate systems tailored to client needs.
second.s2_body: Creating modern, secure, and user-friendly apps for Android, iOS, and web.
second.s3_body: We build real-time analytics, monitoring, and reporting systems for effective decision making.
second.s4_body: Process automation, remote management, technical security systems, all in one platform.

third.title: Empowering your business with technology
third.body: "DAS UTY" LLC is your technology partner capable of turning digital transformation into practical results in any industry. Our mission is to enhance the efficiency and security of our clients through modern IT solutions.

footer.desc: We provide digital excellence through automation and intelligence.

clients.title: What Say Our Clients About Our Awesome Service
clients.c1_quote: The attention to detail and innovative features have completely transformed our workflow. This is exactly what we've been looking for.
clients.c2_quote: Their team delivered a complex platform on time and exceeded every technical expectation. A truly reliable technology partner.
clients.c3_quote: From the first meeting to final delivery, the process was smooth and transparent. Our operations efficiency improved by 40%.
clients.c4_quote: We needed a custom solution fast. DAS UTY delivered a polished product in record time without compromising on quality.
clients.c5_role: Head of IT at Solaris Group
clients.c5_quote: The monitoring system they built gives us full visibility into our infrastructure 24/7. Support is always responsive and professional.

six.title: Each project is driven to a clear result through planning, execution, and control.
six.s1_body: We deeply study the client's needs and develop a custom plan tailored to your business.
six.s2_body: Stages of designing, coding, and testing solutions based on technical specifications.
six.s3_body: After delivery, we continue with ongoing monitoring, technical support, and reporting.

fifth.sub: Explore a selection of our latest works and client success stories.
fifth.p1_body: Integrated IoT solutions for modern living.
fifth.p2_body: Conversational AI to improve customer engagement.
fifth.p3_body: Sleek and responsive design for digital agencies.
fifth.p6_body: Intuitive mobile UX for travel booking.

workers.title: Meet Our Team
workers.muhammadsodiq_quote: Technology is the bridge between vision and reality.
workers.muhammadsodiq_bio: Leads DAS UTY with a passion for digital transformation. Oversees strategy, product direction, and client partnerships across all sectors.
workers.ulugbek_quote: Clean architecture is the foundation of every great product.
workers.ulugbek_bio: Builds robust server-side systems with Python and Django. Ensures scalability, security, and performance across all backend services.
workers.sherzod_quote: A great UI is one the user never has to think about.
workers.sherzod_bio: Crafts fast, accessible, and visually compelling interfaces using React and TypeScript. Obsessed with pixel-perfect detail.
workers.sunnat_quote: Mobile-first is not a trend — it's a mindset.
workers.sunnat_bio: Develops cross-platform mobile apps with Flutter. Brings smooth, native-quality experiences to both iOS and Android users.
workers.bahrom_quote: Reliability is built, not hoped for.
workers.bahrom_bio: Manages cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines. Keeps deployments smooth, systems monitored, and downtime near zero.
workers.bahtiyor_quote: Design is how it works, not just how it looks.
workers.bahtiyor_bio: Creates intuitive user experiences through research-driven design. Bridges the gap between complex systems and simple interactions.
workers.behzod_quote: I speak both frontend and backend fluently.
workers.behzod_bio: Builds end-to-end features across the full stack. Comfortable switching between Vue components and Node.js APIs in the same sprint.
workers.bobur_quote: Every millisecond matters in a great API.
workers.bobur_bio: Designs and maintains high-performance Java services with Spring Boot. Focuses on clean REST APIs and optimized database queries.
workers.eldor_quote: Data tells a story — I help clients hear it.
workers.eldor_bio: Transforms raw data into actionable insights using Python and Power BI. Supports decision-making with real-time dashboards and reports.
workers.ismoil_bio: Specializes in React-based UIs with a focus on state management and performance. Turns complex requirements into clean components.
workers.jamshid_quote: The best app is the one people actually enjoy using.
workers.jamshid_bio: Develops feature-rich React Native apps. Combines JavaScript flexibility with native APIs to deliver seamless mobile experiences.
workers.javohir_quote: A well-analyzed problem is half solved.
workers.javohir_bio: Bridges business requirements and technical solutions. Models processes with UML and BPMN to ensure projects start on solid ground.
workers.jobir_quote: Quality is not an act, it is a habit.
workers.jobir_bio: Ensures every release meets the highest quality bar. Designs automated test suites with Selenium and Cypress to catch issues early.
workers.nurbek_quote: Good infrastructure is invisible — until you need it.
workers.nurbek_bio: Maintains server health, automates deployments, and keeps CI/CD pipelines running. Passionate about Linux and container orchestration.
workers.sarvar_bio: Builds scalable Node.js microservices backed by MongoDB and Redis. Focuses on clean code, fast response times, and solid documentation.
workers.shaxrillo_quote: Vue makes complex things feel elegantly simple.
workers.shaxrillo_bio: Creates reactive, maintainable frontends with Vue and Nuxt. Champions component reuse and developer experience across all projects.
workers.shohruh_quote: Empathy is my most important design tool.
workers.shohruh_bio: Conducts user research and prototyping to ensure every interface feels natural. Delivers polished Figma designs ready for development.

fourth.title: We provide digital solutions for any industry
fourth.sub: At DAS UTY, we turn your digital ideas into working technologies. With technology, we take your business to the next level.
fourth.i1_body: Flexible solutions to make your processes fast, consistent, and free from human errors.
fourth.i2_body: AI algorithms that support decision-making based on statistical and behavioral data.
fourth.i3_body: Save time and resources with systems that automate internal workflows, document flow, and task execution.
fourth.i4_body: We simplify digital communication by developing custom web and mobile platforms for your clients, employees, or partners.
fourth.i5_body: Digital tools to remotely monitor and ensure the security of your facilities.
fourth.i6_body: Online monitoring of infrastructure, services, or production processes.
